title: chorizandra involucrata
intro: Chorizandra involucrata, also known as Marsh Horsetail, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic properties. The health benefits of Chorizandra involucrata include reducing inflammation, treating urinary tract infections, and helping to manage blood pressure. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, and can also be used in tincture or capsule form for its medicinal benefits.
